hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"tasks workflow: run the verifying-pr-locally skill (static CI + local runtime E2E against real Asana) BEFORE merging, if you have not already."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"tasks workflow: the merge auto-deploys on main. Monitor Deploy Functions + Deploy API + CI to green: gh run list --branch main"}}'
